name: New Broker Onboarding
description: Nurture new brokers from first listing through activation

steps.name: Send Email Step
steps.subject: Claim Your Listing - Fast Approval Available
steps.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

I noticed your listing and wanted to reach out personally.

We specialize in fast approvals and competitive rates.

Best regards,
The LoanBud Team

steps.name: Call Reminder Step
steps.note: Follow up on email sent Day 0. Ask if they reviewed our offer.

steps.name: Send SMS Step
steps.message: Hi {{first_name}}, just checking in on your listing application. Reply anytime — we're here to help!

name: Re-engagement Flow
description: Win back inactive partners with a structured touchpoint series

steps.name: Send Email Step
steps.subject: We miss you — let's reconnect
steps.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

We haven't heard from you in a while and wanted to reconnect.

We have some exciting new programs that might be a great fit for you.

Best,
LoanBud Team

steps.name: Call Reminder Step
steps.note: Check if they opened the re-engagement email. Offer a quick intro call.
